case_title: HARWOOD, EDWARD VS BROADBENT, WAYNE E.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY HARWOOD, EDWARD AS TO DEFENDANT BROADBENT, WAYNE E. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-17-2000 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BROADBENT, WAYNE E.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HARWOOD, EDWARD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROADBENT, WAYNE E. $2,309.94 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,329.94 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLTFF FILING FOR MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION,PAID $14 CASH,TOLD TO WAIT AT LEAST 15 DAYS.
PLFT'S EDWARD T. HARWOOD MOTIO FOR RECONSIDETATION DENIED BY COMMISSIONER. NOTICED SENT TO PLFT & DEF
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BROADBENT, WAYNE E.
COMPARE AND/OR CERTIFY COPY OF ANY RECORD ON FILE FOR FILED BY DEFENDANT BROADBENT, WAYNE E.
